title: Maintaining currency of standards
doc_html:
§173.  Maintaining currency of standards

The office of state lands shall have the authority to promulgate and adopt such additional standards and upgrade existing standards regarding land information and records systems by rules adopted pursuant to the Administrative Procedure Act.  

Acts 1991, No. 955, §1.
